name: DATATBLS_GetItemDataByCode
abi_note: TRUE ABI from disasm: stdcall with THREE stack slots (RET 0xC), only slot 0 used. A 1-arg spec corrupts the oracle stack (batch-1 SEH fault). Ghidra prototype corrected post-proof.
vector_note: pItemCode is a buf whose 4-byte initial value is an ADDRESS of static always-mapped D2Common memory; the fn double-derefs (short**) and sign-extends (MOVSX). 0x6fdc1994 holds bytes 98 FB = short 0xFB98 -> proves the sign-extension. Null path (pItemCode==NULL) not reachable via buf kind (oracle buffer address is never null) -- trivially correct by inspection.
